keyEvents.text: Goal! Spain 1, Austria 0. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Marc Cucurella with a cross.
Substitution, Austria. Florian Grillitsch replaces Xaver Schlager.
Substitution, Austria. Carney Chukwuemeka replaces Nicolas Seiwald.
Substitution, Austria. Sasa Kalajdzic replaces Romano Schmid.
Substitution, Austria. Marko Arnautovic replaces Michael Gregoritsch.
Goal! Spain 2, Austria 0. Pedro Porro (Spain) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Álex Baena.
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Álex Baena.
Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.
Stefan Posch (Austria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Spain. Gavi replaces Lamine Yamal.
Substitution, Austria. Alexander Prass replaces Stefan Posch.
Goal! Spain 3, Austria 0. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Marc Cucurella.
Substitution, Spain. Fabián Ruiz replaces Pedri.
Substitution, Spain. Marc Pubill replaces Aymeric Laporte.
Rúben Dias (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Croatia. Igor Matanovic replaces Ante Budimir.
Goal! Portugal 0, Croatia 1. Ivan Perisic (Croatia) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal.
Luka Modric (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Portugal. Bernardo Silva replaces Vitinha.
Substitution, Portugal. Francisco Conceição replaces Pedro Neto.
Substitution, Portugal. Nélson Semedo replaces Bruno Fernandes.
Substitution, Portugal. Gonçalo Ramos replaces João Cancelo.
Goal! Portugal 1, Croatia 1. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Croatia. Mario Pasalic replaces Martin Baturina.
Substitution, Portugal. Rúben Neves replaces Cristiano Ronaldo.
Substitution, Croatia. Josko Gvardiol replaces Nikola Vlasic.
Goal! Portugal 2, Croatia 1. Gonçalo Ramos (Portugal) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Rafael Leão with a cross.
Substitution, Croatia. Andrej Kramaric replaces Mateo Kovacic.
Ivan Perisic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Switzerland 1, Algeria 0. Breel Embolo (Switzerland) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Johan Manzambi following a fast break.
Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Dan Ndoye (Switzerland) Goal at 46'
